title: Enki Hosted Release Candidate and Deployment Decision
description: Assemble the hosted release-candidate evidence package and explicit human deployment decision matrix for Enki.
acceptance_criteria: Hosted architecture validation evidence is hash-bound and attributable
Zero-cost envelope status is explicitly represented as defined or failed
Production deployment prerequisites are explicit as ready or blocked with evidence
Threat model, runbooks, backup/recovery proof, and portability proof are packaged
Deployment rollback and production cost forecast are independently reviewable
Human decision state supports approve, approve with conditions, defer, or reject
